response.justification: Strong senior developer with broad technical experience across web, mobile, embedded, and open-source ecosystems, plus solid Linux/Python-adjacent and architecture exposure through GISCollective and prior leadership-adjacent roles. However, the role explicitly requires German at C1 minimum and the candidate self-reports only Basic German, which is a hard disqualifier for a client-facing executive position in a German-speaking market. Formal team leadership experience and explicit UML expertise are also not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and architecture experience across many stacks, including Linux and open-source platforms
Founded and maintains an open-source geo-data platform (GISCollective), demonstrating end-to-end ownership and OSS alignment
Strong track record in workshops, mentoring, and knowledge sharing (Selenium course, Web Internals, Refactoring Dojos)
concerns: German listed as only Basic — falls well short of the required C1 level
No explicit Head of Development or formal team-lead/people-management experience
UML, requirements management, and formal IT security/compliance experience not evidenced in the resume
